message:
fix: detect stale custom-types sentinel to auto-update types on upgrade

The sentinel file (.gt-types-configured) previously contained just "v1",
so EnsureCustomTypes never re-ran after new types (queue, event) were added.
Now the sentinel stores the actual types list and is compared on read —
stale sentinels trigger automatic re-configuration. (gt-zmy, gt-26f)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
